# The Crazy Bear

> Two boutique hotels with history. Crazy Bear Country in Stadhampton, Oxfordshire and Crazy Bear Town in Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire. Rooms, restaurants, bars, weddings, parties and a members' room called The Bear's Den.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Two hotels, one spirit. Town and Country.
- [About](/about): Where we came from. How we behave.
- [House Rules](/house-rules): How to behave at The Crazy Bear.

## Crazy Bear Country, Stadhampton

- [Country](/country): 16th century inn in Stadhampton, Oxfordshire.
- [Country Pub](/country/pub): Real ale, proper food, fires lit.
- [Country Pub Food](/country/pub/food): Pub food, properly done.
- [Country Pub Drink](/country/pub/drink): Real ale, proper wine, cocktails that bite back.
- [Country Pub Hospitality](/country/pub/hospitality): Fires lit. Doors open.
- [Country Rooms](/country/rooms): Theatrical, indulgent, never the same twice.
- [Country Room Types](/country/rooms/types): Pick your character. Sleep accordingly.
- [Country Bedroom Gallery](/country/rooms/gallery): A look behind the bedroom doors.
- [Country Parties](/country/parties): Loud, long, late.
- [Country Events](/country/events): Private rooms. Whole house. Whatever you need.
- [Weddings](/country/events/weddings): Vows, dinner, dancing. Done properly.
- [Birthdays](/country/events/birthdays): Another year. Worth marking.
- [Business Events](/country/events/business): Meetings that don't feel like meetings.
- [Country Culture](/country/culture): The story and spirit of Country.

## Crazy Bear Town, Beaconsfield

- [Town](/town): Townhouse glamour, almost in London.
- [Town Food](/town/food): Two kitchens. One appetite.
- [The Black Bear](/town/food/black-bear): Modern British plates, charcoal and fire.
- [The B&B](/town/food/bnb): All day kitchen. Breakfast, brunch and into the night.
- [Hom Thai](/town/food/hom-thai): Bangkok by way of Beaconsfield.
- [Town Drink](/town/drink): Mirrored bars. Mischievous pours.
- [Town Cocktails](/town/drink/cocktails): Stirred with intent. Served without apology.
- [Town Rooms](/town/rooms): Velvet, mirror, marble.
- [Town Room Types](/town/rooms/types): Each one its own world.
- [Town Bedroom Gallery](/town/rooms/gallery): Step inside.
- [Town Pool](/town/pool): Hidden, heated, daytime, hotel guests only.
- [Town Culture](/town/culture): The story and spirit of Town.

## Members

- [The Bear's Den](/bears-den): Members' room. Twenty-five percent off everywhere.
- [Join the Bear's Den](/curious): Free membership for all. Gold for 25% off.

## Book and enquire

- [Book a room](/book): Book direct for the best rate.
- [Enquire](/enquire): Tell us what you have in mind.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Unsubscribe](/unsubscribe): Manage email preferences.
